documentation:
## Aliyun ROS PRIVATELINK Construct Library

This module is part of the AliCloud ROS Cloud Development Kit (ROS CDK) project.

```python
import * as PRIVATELINK from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-privatelink';
```

classes.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpoint

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpoint.__init__
documentation:
---
param enable_resource_property_constraint: '-'
param id: '- scoped id of the resource.'
param props: '- resource properties.'
param scope: '- scope in which this resource is defined.'
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpoint._render_properties
documentation:
---
param props: '-'
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpoint.ROS_RESOURCE_TYPE_NAME
documentation: The resource type name for this resource class.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpoint.attr_bandwidth
documentation: :Attribute: Bandwidth: The bandwidth of the endpoint.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpoint.attr_endpoint_domain
documentation: :Attribute: EndpointDomain: The domain name of the endpoint.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpoint.attr_endpoint_id
documentation: :Attribute: EndpointId: The ID of the endpoint.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpoint.attr_endpoint_name
documentation: :Attribute: EndpointName: The name of the endpoint.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpoint.attr_service_id
documentation: :Attribute: ServiceId: The ID of endpoint service that is associated with the endpoint.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpoint.attr_service_name
documentation: :Attribute: ServiceName: The name of endpoint service that is associated with the endpoint.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpoint.attr_vpc_id
documentation: :Attribute: VpcId: The vpc ID of endpoint.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpoint.attr_zone_domains
documentation: :Attribute: ZoneDomains: The zone domains.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpoint.security_group_id
documentation: :Property: securityGroupId: The security group associated with the endpoint network interface. The security group can control the data communication from the VPC to the endpoint network interface.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpoint.vpc_id
documentation: :Property: vpcId: The VPC to which the endpoint belongs.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpoint.endpoint_description
documentation:
:Property:

endpointDescription: The description of the endpoint.
The description must be 2 to 256 characters in length and cannot start with http:// or https://.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpoint.endpoint_name
documentation:
:Property:

endpointName: The name of the endpoint.
The name must be 2 to 128 characters in length and can contain digits, underscores
(_), and hyphens (-). The name must start with a letter.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpoint.endpoint_type
documentation: :Property: endpointType: Endpoint type.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpoint.protected_enabled
documentation:
:Property:

protectedEnabled: Specifies whether to enable user authentication. This parameter is available in Security Token Service (STS) mode. Valid values:
true: yes After user authentication is enabled, only the user who creates the endpoint can modify or delete the endpoint in STS mode.
false (default): no

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpoint.service_id
documentation: :Property: serviceId: The endpoint service that is associated with the endpoint. One of ServiceId and ServiceName is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpoint.service_name
documentation: :Property: serviceName: The name of the endpoint service that is associated with the endpoint. One of ServiceId and ServiceName is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpoint.tags
documentation: :Property: tags: Tags to attach to instance. Max support 20 tags to add during create instance. Each tag with two properties Key and Value, and Key is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpoint.zone
documentation: :Property: zone:

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpoint.zone_private_ip_address_count
documentation: :Property: zonePrivateIpAddressCount: The number of private IP addresses that can be used by an elastic network interface (ENI) in each zone. Set the value to 1.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpoint.TagsProperty.__init__
documentation:
---
param key: true
param value: true
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpoint.TagsProperty.key
documentation: :Property: key: undefined

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpoint.TagsProperty.value
documentation: :Property: value: undefined

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpoint.ZoneProperty.__init__
documentation:
---
param ip: true
param v_switch_id: true
param zone_id: true
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpoint.ZoneProperty.ip
documentation: :Property: ip: The IP address of the zone in which the endpoint is deployed.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpoint.ZoneProperty.v_switch_id
documentation: :Property: vSwitchId: The switch of the endpoint network interface in the given zone.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpoint.ZoneProperty.zone_id
documentation: :Property: zoneId: The zone of the associated endpoint service.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::PrivateLink::VpcEndpoint`, which is used to create an endpoint.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `VpcEndpoint` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-privatelink-vpcendpoint>

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpointProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `RosVpcEndpoint`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-privatelink-vpcendpoint>

```
param security_group_id



param vpc_id



param endpoint_description



param endpoint_name



param endpoint_type



param protected_enabled



param service_id



param service_name



param tags



param zone



param zone_private_ip_address_count

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpointProps.security_group_id
documentation: :Property: securityGroupId: The security group associated with the endpoint network interface. The security group can control the data communication from the VPC to the endpoint network interface.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpointProps.vpc_id
documentation: :Property: vpcId: The VPC to which the endpoint belongs.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpointProps.endpoint_description
documentation:
:Property:

endpointDescription: The description of the endpoint.
The description must be 2 to 256 characters in length and cannot start with http:// or https://.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpointProps.endpoint_name
documentation:
:Property:

endpointName: The name of the endpoint.
The name must be 2 to 128 characters in length and can contain digits, underscores
(_), and hyphens (-). The name must start with a letter.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpointProps.endpoint_type
documentation: :Property: endpointType: Endpoint type.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpointProps.protected_enabled
documentation:
:Property:

protectedEnabled: Specifies whether to enable user authentication. This parameter is available in Security Token Service (STS) mode. Valid values:
true: yes After user authentication is enabled, only the user who creates the endpoint can modify or delete the endpoint in STS mode.
false (default): no

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpointProps.service_id
documentation: :Property: serviceId: The endpoint service that is associated with the endpoint. One of ServiceId and ServiceName is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpointProps.service_name
documentation: :Property: serviceName: The name of the endpoint service that is associated with the endpoint. One of ServiceId and ServiceName is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpointProps.tags
documentation: :Property: tags: Tags to attach to instance. Max support 20 tags to add during create instance. Each tag with two properties Key and Value, and Key is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpointProps.zone
documentation: :Property: zone:

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpointProps.zone_private_ip_address_count
documentation: :Property: zonePrivateIpAddressCount: The number of private IP addresses that can be used by an elastic network interface (ENI) in each zone. Set the value to 1.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpointService.ROS_RESOURCE_TYPE_NAME
documentation: The resource type name for this resource class.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpointService.attr_max_bandwidth
documentation: :Attribute: MaxBandwidth: The maximum bandwidth of the endpoint connection.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpointService.attr_min_bandwidth
documentation: :Attribute: MinBandwidth: The minimum bandwidth of the endpoint connection.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpointService.attr_service_description
documentation: :Attribute: ServiceDescription: The description of the endpoint service.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpointService.attr_service_domain
documentation: :Attribute: ServiceDomain: The domain name of the endpoint service.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpointService.attr_service_id
documentation: :Attribute: ServiceId: The ID of the endpoint service.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpointService.attr_service_name
documentation: :Attribute: ServiceName: The name of the endpoint service.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpointService.auto_accept_enabled
documentation:
:Property:

autoAcceptEnabled: Specifies whether to automatically accept endpoint connection requests. Valid values:
true: automatically accepts endpoint connection requests.
false: does not automatically accept endpoint connection requests.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpointService.connect_bandwidth
documentation: :Property: connectBandwidth: The default maximum bandwidth of the endpoint connection. Valid values: 100 to 1024. Unit: Mbit/s.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpointService.deletion_force
documentation:
:Property:

deletionForce: Specifies whether to delete the endpoint service even if it has endpoint connections.

- True
- False (default)

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpointService.payer
documentation:
:Property:

payer: The payer of the endpoint service. Valid values:
Endpoint: the service consumer.
EndpointService: the service provider.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpointService.resource
documentation: :Property: resource:

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpointService.resource_group_id
documentation: :Property: resourceGroupId: The ID of the resource group.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpointService.service_description
documentation: :Property: serviceDescription: The description for the endpoint service.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpointService.service_resource_type
documentation: :Property: serviceResourceType: Service resource type.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpointService.tags
documentation: :Property: tags: Tags to attach to instance. Max support 20 tags to add during create instance. Each tag with two properties Key and Value, and Key is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpointService.user
documentation: :Property: user: Account IDs to the whitelist of an endpoint service.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.RosVpcEndpointService.zone_affinity_enabled
documentation:
:Property:

zoneAffinityEnabled: Specifies whether to resolve domain names to IP addresses in the nearest zone.
true: yes.
false (default): no

resourceType: The resource type. Allowed values:

- slb: indicates a Classic Load Balancer (CLB) instance whose service resource type is a private network and supports the PrivateLink function.
- alb: indicates an Application Load Balancer (ALB) instance whose service resources are private networks and which supports the PrivateLink function.
- nlb: indicates a Network Load Balancer (NLB) instance that uses private network resources and supports the PrivateLink function.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::PrivateLink::VpcEndpoint`, which is used to create an endpoint.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosVpcEndpoint\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-privatelink-vpcendpoint>

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.VpcEndpointProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `VpcEndpoint`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-privatelink-vpcendpoint>

```
param security_group_id

Property securityGroupId: The security group associated with the endpoint network interface. The security group can control the data communication from the VPC to the endpoint network interface.

param vpc_id

Property vpcId: The VPC to which the endpoint belongs.

param endpoint_description

Property endpointDescription: The description of the endpoint. The description must be 2 to 256 characters in length and cannot start with http:// or https://.

param endpoint_name

Property endpointName: The name of the endpoint. The name must be 2 to 128 characters in length and can contain digits, underscores (_), and hyphens (-). The name must start with a letter.

param endpoint_type

Property endpointType: Endpoint type.

param protected_enabled

Property protectedEnabled: Specifies whether to enable user authentication. This parameter is available in Security Token Service (STS) mode. Valid values: true: yes After user authentication is enabled, only the user who creates the endpoint can modify or delete the endpoint in STS mode. false (default): no

param service_id

Property serviceId: The endpoint service that is associated with the endpoint. One of ServiceId and ServiceName is required.

param service_name

Property serviceName: The name of the endpoint service that is associated with the endpoint. One of ServiceId and ServiceName is required.

param tags

Property tags: Tags to attach to instance. Max support 20 tags to add during create instance. Each tag with two properties Key and Value, and Key is required.

param zone

Property zone:.

param zone_private_ip_address_count

Property zonePrivateIpAddressCount: The number of private IP addresses that can be used by an elastic network interface (ENI) in each zone. Set the value to 1.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.VpcEndpointProps.security_group_id
documentation:

The security group can control the data communication from the VPC to the endpoint network interface.

methods.name: ros_cdk_privatelink.VpcEndpointServiceProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `VpcEndpointService`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-privatelink-vpcendpointservice>

```
param auto_accept_enabled

Property autoAcceptEnabled: Specifies whether to automatically accept endpoint connection requests. Valid values: true: automatically accepts endpoint connection requests. false: does not automatically accept endpoint connection requests.

param connect_bandwidth

Property connectBandwidth: The default maximum bandwidth of the endpoint connection. Valid values: 100 to 1024. Unit: Mbit/s.

param deletion_force

Property deletionForce: Specifies whether to delete the endpoint service even if it has endpoint connections. - True - False (default)

param payer

Property payer: The payer of the endpoint service. Valid values: Endpoint: the service consumer. EndpointService: the service provider.

param resource

Property resource:.

param resource_group_id

Property resourceGroupId: The ID of the resource group.

param service_description

Property serviceDescription: The description for the endpoint service.

param service_resource_type

Property serviceResourceType: Service resource type.

param tags

Property tags: Tags to attach to instance. Max support 20 tags to add during create instance. Each tag with two properties Key and Value, and Key is required.

param user

Property user: Account IDs to the whitelist of an endpoint service.

param zone_affinity_enabled

Property zoneAffinityEnabled: Specifies whether to resolve domain names to IP addresses in the nearest zone. true: yes. false (default): no
```
